response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with current hands-on work at re:cinq spanning TypeScript/Node.js product development and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) — a direct match for the AI agent development requirement. His stack covers TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and Git, and he has a documented track record of TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development from RIDE Capital. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and no Kotlin experience, but his polyglot background (TS, Java, D, C/C++, Swift, PHP) and craftsmanship orientation make ramp-up low-risk.
strengths: Current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP generators, agentic frameworks) directly matches a key requirement
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS experience with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshops on testing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is older (robotics/mobile orchestration at Altom, pre-2018)
Testing frameworks named (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) not explicitly cited, though TDD background suggests easy adoption
